summary: All Stream B items verified: augment.py with generate/load functions, correct schema (T-raug IDs, role_augmented granularity), idempotent caching. targets.py conditionally adds role_augmented. evaluate.py handles role_augmented via target[role]. 18 tests in test_augment.py.

All Stream C items verified: rerank.py with sigmoid+sorting+top-N, fusion.py with 1-based RRF+fuse_all. embed.py orchestration: role_augmented .get() guard, config-gated reranking (+rerank method), config-gated fusion post-collection. Config sections with enabled:false. 15 tests across test_rerank.py and test_fusion.py, 8 new tests in test_embed.py.

advisories: _strip_code_fences crashes on edge case (no newline after opening fence) — unlikely with real LLM output
fuse_all silently drops test cases missing from a method — raises confusing error downstream instead of descriptive one
augment.py fallback source_role_id T-role-0000 when LLM returns unmatched role — should log warning
rerank_batch lenient on empty candidates vs rerank strict — correct design but behavioral difference undocumented
summary: Clean implementation. No anti-patterns. All spec criteria met. Sigmoid, RRF math, config-gating, backward compatibility all verified. 4 minor advisories around edge-case robustness.
